codeReview.summary: The change is narrowly scoped to the test harness, matches the feature's allowed session-message-based observability approach, and correctly exposes a typed accessor without touching production code. The helper is sound because `AgentSession.sendUserMessage(..., { deliverAs: "followUp" })` ultimately produces a `role: "user"` message in session history, so filtering `session.messages` by the SANEPI directive header observes real continuation injections.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker used the repo init entrypoint `.factory/init.sh`, but that setup command is not represented in `.factory/services.yaml`, so future workers have to discover it ad hoc from transcripts or habit instead of from the shared command manifest.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for worker session 71378999-63e8-43e9-a6d0-ca96d8c1fd18 shows `Execute` of `/Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/sanepi-mono/.factory/init.sh`; `/Users/yeongyu/local-workspaces/sanepi-mono/.factory/services.yaml` lists install/build/check/test commands only and no init/setup entry.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, commit d2f50c6346ac104f03c572660ea179fcba421ec2, and shared-state docs. The feature passes review: it adds the requested additive harness helper, stays out of `src/`, leaves existing harness behavior intact, and aligns with VAL-CROSS-016.
